title: MaintainabilityReport
description: Structured `--json` output envelope emitted by check-maintainability.js. Parity shape with crap-report (kernelVersion, summary, violations) minus fixGuidance — MI scores don't decompose along the two CRAP axes, so per-violation remediation guidance is intentionally absent.

kernelVersion.description: MI report envelope version. Bumped when the envelope shape changes.

scope.description: Story #1394: which scope produced this envelope. `diff` (default) = filter scan + baseline against the resolved git ref; `full` = full-repo scan via the `--full-scope` opt-out.

diffRef.description: Story #1394: the git ref the diff was scoped against (e.g. `main`, `epic/1386`), or null when `scope === 'full'`.
